dead_escalations: reference_image_urls (video.generate) — same model rejection, not id-vs-url
finding_doc.editor_compositing: Grok Imagine web @2+ compositing binds reference sheets via reference_images; not via prose @UUID tokens alone.
finding_doc.finding: SDK exposes reference_image_file_ids on client.video.generate() but grok-imagine-video-1.5 returns 'reference_images is not supported for this model'. Barebones identity lock requires API parity, composite-first-frame, or Editor manual path.

sdk_note: SDK documents separate modes: i2v (image_file_id) vs pure R2V (reference_image_* only, no image_file_id). PR1 uses i2v+refs combo.
